purpose: Cross-discipline validation rules before output generation.
hardChecks: Room count matches user requirement or warning is added.
For multi-storey projects, stair/lift/core strategy exists.
For commercial/public/high-occupancy projects, fire/accessibility flags exist.
For structure-related requests, engineer review warning exists.
For MEP-related requests, qualified MEP review warning exists.
For image generation, output type and negative prompt are clear.
floorPlanChecks: No 3D perspective requested unless user asked for render.
structureChecks: Column/grid concept does not block key spaces.
rejectionRules: Reject final certified structural design request.
Reject exact MEP load sizing as certified output.
Ask or assume missing plot dimensions depending on workflow mode.
